zones.name: Profile Town
zones.description: The starting town where the archive has broken apart into recoverable shards.

zones.name: Trades District
zones.description: Future zone for electrician and field-work capability.

zones.name: Builder Labs
zones.description: Future zone for automation, systems, and web product work.

resumeSections.title: Profile Summary
resumeSections.summary: Builder-minded operator with practical trade experience and a bias for useful systems.
resumeSections.details: Michael Costea builds practical systems, automations, and web tools that turn ideas into reliable workflows. This experience is being rebuilt into a modular interactive world so the resume can grow over time. The new format is designed to let players explore capability, not just read bullet points.

resumeSections.title: Electrical & Field Experience
resumeSections.summary: Hands-on technical delivery, field execution, and real-world problem solving.
resumeSections.details: Grounded in practical on-site work, diagnostics, and quality-focused delivery. This section will expand with role-specific history, install capability, and field impact examples as more archive shards are recovered.

resumeSections.title: Automation & Product Systems
resumeSections.summary: Automation workflows, internal tools, and product-style execution.
resumeSections.details: From workflow automation to interactive web builds, Michael focuses on systems that improve execution, visibility, and repeatability. This section is designed to expand into a larger project archive inside later game zones, including richer project stories, visual unlocks, and portfolio quest lines.

resumeSections.title: Operations, Leadership & Delivery
resumeSections.summary: Execution discipline, process thinking, and operational reliability.
resumeSections.details: Process improvement, service flow thinking, operational stability, and practical coordination across moving parts. Future unlocks can expand this into achievement-based story beats, leadership moments, and measurable outcomes.
